creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
To celebrate my little health milestone and our 12th Blogversary, we went to The Lounge @addressbeachresort for Afternoon Tea. 

I love going to Afternoon Teas. For me, it’s a relaxing foodie ritual 🥰 and The Lounge at The Address Beach Resort hits all the right spots! The ambience is calm and inviting. The staff are friendly and thoughtful; they asked if we have food allergies before preparing our afternoon tea tray.

We had the British Afternoon Tea which includes exquisite sweet and savory bites, warm scones, chocolate-covered strawberries, and 2 beverages. The set is well varied and scrumptious! 

💰 AED 158 per person
🕒 Available daily, 3.00 pm - 7.00 pm
❣️ The Lounge has a minimum spend of AED 150 per person.

Save this for your next tea date. 💗☕️

#AddressBeachResort #AfternoonTea #DubaiDestinations #dubai #mydubai #visitdubai #dubaireels #lifewithladyanne #ladyandhersweetescapes

transcription.text: There she goes, there she goes again, racing through my brain
